questions.question: Describe the main difference between a Datagram and a Datagram Transport Protocol (DTP) packet. (5 marks)
questions.hint: Datagram Transport Protocol (DTP) is an error-checked protocol

questions.question: What is the primary function of Distance-Vector Routing Protocol (DVR)? (5 marks)
questions.hint: To determine the shortest path to a destination network

questions.question: Explain the difference between Link-State Routing Protocol (LSR) and Path-Vector Routing Protocol (PVR). (5 marks)
questions.hint: Link-State Routing Protocol (LSR) uses a map of the network topology, whereas Path-Vector Routing Protocol (PVR) uses the sequence of paths taken to reach a destination
